title: Castle Hill Kitchen & Laundry Renovation
summary: Kitchen and laundry renovation in Castle Hill — new shaker cabinetry, island bench and a fully rebuilt laundry with teal splashback.
heroAlt: Castle Hill kitchen renovation with white shaker cabinetry, island bench and pendant lights
overview: This Castle Hill project replaced a dated timber kitchen and cramped laundry with a clean white shaker fitout and a properly rebuilt utility room. The kitchen opened up with a new island, pendant lighting and full-height cabinetry, while the laundry went from a single tub and top-loader to a resolved joinery package with side-by-side appliances and a tiled splashback.
materials: White shaker kitchen cabinetry with island bench
Laundry joinery with full-height overhead storage
Teal subway tile splashback in laundry

afterImages.alt: Castle Hill completed kitchen — white shaker cabinetry, island bench and pendant lights
afterImages.caption: Completed Castle Hill kitchen with white shaker cabinetry, stone island, pendant lighting and full-height storage replacing the original timber fitout.

afterImages.alt: Castle Hill completed laundry with teal splashback, overhead storage and side-by-side appliances
afterImages.caption: Completed laundry with full-height overhead cabinetry, stone benchtop, teal subway tile splashback and side-by-side black appliances.

beforeImages.alt: Castle Hill kitchen before renovation — original timber cabinetry and dark benchtop
beforeImages.caption: The original Castle Hill kitchen before renovation — dated timber cabinetry, dark benchtop and an island that made the room feel heavy and closed in.

beforeImages.alt: Castle Hill laundry before renovation — original tub and top-loader
beforeImages.caption: The original laundry before the renovation — exposed tub, top-loader and no proper storage or benchtop.

spaces.title: Kitchen
spaces.text: The kitchen was stripped back and rebuilt with white shaker joinery, a new island bench, pendant lighting and a cleaner layout that makes the room feel larger and easier to use.
spaces.alt: Castle Hill completed kitchen with white shaker cabinetry and island bench

spaces.title: Laundry
spaces.text: The laundry was rebuilt from scratch — full-height overhead storage, stone benchtop, teal subway tile splashback and side-by-side appliances in a properly resolved utility layout.
spaces.alt: Castle Hill completed laundry with teal splashback and overhead cabinetry

outcome: Both rooms went from dated and cramped to clean and functional. The kitchen and laundry now read as part of the same home rather than two rooms that were never properly finished.
ctaText: Planning a kitchen or laundry renovation in Castle Hill or the Hills District? Send through your layout and we can help shape the scope.
